node.text: Joanna is interested in trying Nate's dairy-free ice cream recipe made with coconut milk, vanilla extract, sugar, and salt.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "recommendations") AND atom(content =~ "Nate") on Observation 6 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna watched 'The Lord of the Rings' Trilogy based on Nate's recommendation and found it awesome.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "recommendations") AND atom(content =~ "Nate") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Joanna started working on a book recently after her movie did well. The book explores themes of loss, redemption, and forgiveness.
